scripts.predeploy: test -n "$VITE_TMDB_KEY" || grep -qs '^VITE_TMDB_KEY=.' .env.local || { echo '❌ VITE_TMDB_KEY mancante (.env.local): la build uscirebbe senza chiave TMDB (niente cast/streaming/simili). Deploy annullato.'; exit 1; }
scripts.deploy: npm run build && cd dist && touch .nojekyll && git init -q && git checkout -qb gh-pages && git add -A && git commit -qm deploy && git push -qf https://github.com/elisasimoni/seriality.git gh-pages && cd .. && rm -rf dist/.git && echo '✅ deploy su https://elisasimoni.github.io/seriality/'
